originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&thisopt` is never used.

reasoning: Line 13: `thisopt = SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1` in ssl_cmd_protocol_parse(). When HAVE_TLSV1_X=T, SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1 is defined (L3-5). thisopt is assigned but never read afterward — dead store. No '// ERROR' at L13 → new bug not in VBDB. PC = HAVE_TLSV1_X=T is exact (HAVE_TLSV1_X=F causes compile error at L13). Classification: TRUE_NEW.
